summary: TelegramFetcher adapter implementing Fetcher interface via gotd/td Telegram API client
side_effects: calls Telegram API via gotd/td client to resolve channel usernames
calls Telegram API to fetch message history
parses Telegram message types (MessagesMessages, MessagesMessagesSlice, MessagesChannelMessages)
notes: Adapter matching hints (TelegramFetcher with 3 functions: NewTelegramFetcher, FetchNewMessages, extractMessages). Implements Fetcher interface defined in refresh.go. Uses gotd/td client for ContactsResolveUsername and MessagesGetHistory. Supports incremental sync via MinID parameter (afterMsgID > 0). Extracts only non-empty Message types, ignoring other message classes. Handles multiple Telegram API response types (MessagesMessages, MessagesMessagesSlice, MessagesChannelMessages).
